creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, This is not a problem report, this is an user issue. You should 
first ask the mailinglists to obtain additional information and then 
proceed by filing a PR (if needed). 

I will close this PR since that was not done yet, please proceed to 
http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-ports and request 
for help there.
